apps.name: Cypher Drive
apps.return_to_launcher: Use the app's Return to Launcher item where shown.
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV HID payload launcher build.

apps.name: ESP32 BT HID
apps.return_to_launcher: Press backtick, Esc, or Del from the top-level device list.
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV BLE-HID payload deck with SD-backed DuckyScript payloads and Cypher OS return support.

apps.name: ESP32 Pokedex
apps.return_to_launcher: Choose Return to Cypher OS from the home menu.
apps.notes: Offline Cardputer Pokemon GO field guide using existing SD data under /pokemon, /audio, and /config.

apps.name: Cypher Chat
apps.return_to_launcher: Use the app's Return to Launcher item where shown.
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV secure-only mesh chat build. Mesh protocol 0x02 uses AES-256-GCM and does not interoperate with plaintext or HMAC-only firmware.

apps.name: Cardputer Games
apps.return_to_launcher: Use the app's Return to Launcher item where shown.

apps.name: Cardputer MPC
apps.return_to_launcher: Press Shift+Q to return to Cypher OS. Lowercase q remains an MPC pad trigger.
apps.notes: MPC-style groovebox with SD-loaded samples and sequencing.

apps.name: Cardputer Tarot
apps.return_to_launcher: Back/backtick from the main menu returns to Cypher OS.
apps.notes: Offline tarot pull, journal, history, and study deck app.

apps.name: Cypher PN532
apps.return_to_launcher: Use Return to Cypher OS, or press Del, Tab, backtick, or Q from the main menu.
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV PN532 NFC app using EXT I2C on G8/G9 with SD-backed dumps and return-to-launcher support.

apps.name: Cypher Desk
apps.return_to_launcher: Use Return to Launcher from the app menu.
apps.notes: Offline Cardputer ADV utility suite with notes, calculator, checklist, converters, and scratchpad.

apps.name: Flock You
apps.return_to_launcher: Open the mini menu, cycle to HOME, then press up/down to return.
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV WiFi/BLE detector build with return-to-launcher support.

apps.name: WireTap-32 Cardputer
apps.return_to_launcher: Choose Launcher from the main menu, or type launcher / return over serial.
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV EXT bench build with return-to-launcher support.

imports.name: Cardputer Game OS Games
imports.return_to_launcher: Use the imported game's launcher return control where documented.
imports.notes: Imports individual game .bin files from the sibling Cardputer Game OS build manifest.
